name: trs
install_doc: npm `@dpeluche/trs` (Rust binary). `trs init claude --global` writes a PreToolUse hook to ~/.claude/settings.json that rewrites outbound commands to `trs <cmd>`, plus an output-saver rules block (~/.claude/trs-output-saver.md @import'd into CLAUDE.md). Per-agent init also covers gemini/cursor/opencode/kilo/pi/droid/codex/copilot.
notes: Rust per-command output compactor (rtk/tokenade category). NOTABLE: programmatic command-rewrite hooks for many agents tokenade only does MCP/wrap for — Cursor (~/.cursor/hooks.json preToolUse + updated_input), VS Code Copilot, Factory Droid (Claude PreToolUse wire format verbatim), Pi (~/.pi/agent/extensions/trs.ts spawnHook), OpenCode/Kilo (plugin templates), Codex>=0.134. Antigravity/Devin = rules-only. Cache-safe (compacts tool output, never rewrites history).
